heroCore.title: Your consular services
heroCore.description: Passport, civil status, consular protection... Complete your Gabonese administrative procedures online, 24/7, from any country.

setupPin.title: Secure your account with a PIN code

consentBullets.purpose: The recording will be kept for {{days}} days, then automatically deleted.
consentBullets.rights: You have the right to access, rectify, and delete your data (GDPR).
consentBullets.optional: Recording is optional — you may refuse without any impact on your request.

push.sectionDescription: Receive alerts even when the tab is closed.

triggers.slaBreach: A call has exceeded the SLA

schedules.autoPresenceHint: Your status switches between online and offline based on your weekly schedule.

personal.description: Each member is automatically a direct communication line (iAppel, iMessage, iBoîte, iCorrespondance).

fromExisting.title: From an existing template
fromExisting.description: Clone a global template or another template from the organization.

create.noSourcesForOrgType: No template available to clone for this organization type.

syncBanner.title: Update available from the global template
syncBanner.description: The source template is at version {{sourceVersion}}, your clone is based on version {{cloneVersion}}. Syncing archives your current version before applying the source content — nothing is lost.
syncBanner.success: Template synced from the global template

lockBanner.title: Template locked for editing
lockBanner.description: Documents have already been generated from this template. Any change will increment the version and archive the current state in history. Already-produced documents stay tied to their original version.
lockBanner.descriptionExtended: Documents have already been generated from this template. Any change will increment the version and archive the current state in history. Already-produced documents stay tied to their original version and are not affected.

placeholders.title: Dynamic variables
placeholders.description: Variables declared here appear in the editor and are filled at generation with the request's data.

addSheet.title: Add a dynamic variable
addSheet.description: Variables are filled at generation with the request's data (user, profile, form, organization, system).

fields.keyHint: snake_case, no accents — shown as-is in the editor ({{applicant_name}})
fields.label: Label

picker.emptyHint: Declare the template's dynamic variables in the configuration to be able to insert them in the text.
picker.instructions: Click to insert at cursor. The value will be replaced at generation.

toolbar.signerRoleHint: Optional — position code (e.g. chef_poste). Empty = any agent.

drawer.title: AI Assistant
drawer.subtitle: Import an existing document or describe what you want — the AI produces a ready-to-use Tiptap template.

fields.promptPlaceholder: Eg: "Generate a residence certificate with the org logo at the top, a placeholder for the applicant's name, date of birth, address, and a signature of the head of post at the bottom."
fields.dropFile: Click to upload a PDF or an image
fields.dropFileHint: Max 10 MB — the AI mimics the layout when generating the template.

phases.loading: The AI is generating your template…
phases.loadingHint: This takes 10-30 seconds depending on the source document size.
phases.resultHint: {{blocks}} blocks and {{placeholders}} variable(s) detected. Review then apply.

errors.title: Generation error
errors.generic: An error occurred — try again or refine your description.

layout.sectionDescription: Paper size, orientation and margins for the template.

autoGen.title: Automatic document generation
autoGen.description: Configure the templates that will be produced automatically on request submission or status transition.

empty.title: No rule configured
empty.description: Add a rule to trigger a generation on submission or status transition.

autoSign.description: Apply the agent's signature at generation.

autoPublish.title: Publish to citizen
autoPublish.description: Make the document visible immediately after generation.

mapping.title: Variable mapping
mapping.description: Choose for each template variable which source to use at generation.

preview.title: Resolution preview

preview.errorWarning: A variable failed to resolve — fix the template mapping or auto-gen rule before generating.
preview.noPlaceholders: This template has no variables — generation will produce the content as-is.

banner.allResolvedBody: The document is ready to generate.
banner.emptyBody: Generation will continue but those spots will be blank in the PDF.
banner.errorsBody: Map these manually before generating to avoid a silent error.

visualPreview.title: Document preview
visualPreview.unavailable: Preview unavailable — make sure the template has content.

mapping.description: For each variable, pick a different source/path, or type a free value. Statuses update live.

mapping.pathEmpty: No field available for this source.

bulk.description_other: The selected template will be applied to {{count}} requests. Documents will appear shortly in each request.

hero.title: The
hero.description: Build, represent, and assist. In accordance with the Vienna Conventions, this digital space modernizes the sovereign mission of Gabonese diplomatic and consular personnel worldwide.

missions.title: The Digital Exercise
missions.subtitle: The application aligns with the fundamental pillars of international relations and assistance to compatriots.

items.title: Representation & Negotiation
items.description: In accordance with the Vienna Convention (1961), the Correspondence module secures your exchanges (verbal notes, memoranda) to the receiving State or Central authority.

items.title: Consular Protection
items.description: The management of requests and registrations (Vienna Convention, 1963) ensures rapid protection and assistance to our nationals in distress.

items.title: Archive Inviolability
items.description: iDocument and iArchive transform the diplomatic pouch into an inviolable digital vault, guaranteeing the secrecy of missions.

feature1.title: Administration Modernization
feature1.p1: The transition to this portal meets the requirement of a modern, agile and responsive administration. Diplomatic personnel are no longer hampered by physical bureaucratic burdens. Each document is digitized, tracked, and approved through a clear hierarchical chain.
feature1.p2: The development of friendly, cultural and economic relations requires responsiveness: this is the fundamental function of the integrated agenda and communication modules.

feature2.title: The Consular Division
feature2.description: Issuance of visas, passport renewal, establishment of civil status documents: consular posts are the primary showcase of the Gabonese State. Digitization enables accelerated delivery.
points: Organization of diplomatic and courtesy visas

overview.description: Diplomate.ga is the digital extension of obligations arising from the Vienna Conventions. Each module addresses a specific article, ensuring full legal compliance of Gabonese diplomatic and consular operations.
overview.conventionsDesc: Founding texts of international diplomatic and consular law
overview.atoutsDesc: How each module implements the requirements of the Conventions

tutorials.subtitle: Practical guides to master each module

cta.title: Ready to serve the State?
cta.description: Log in to your agent space to access the sovereignty instruments of the Gabonese Republic.
